_comment: One-line lore / goofy proverbs shown under a specimen and offered by contemplative ones. Deterministic pick by seed, cached at mint. Warm, absurd, never a scold.
pool: A rock that is petted is a rock that is understood.
The wobble is not a flaw. The wobble is the whole idea.
Nothing you did today was wasted; some of it was just weird.
Small and content beats large and worried.
The cabinet remembers you kindly, which is more than most cabinets manage.
To do one small thing is to have done a thing.
The fan spins for no one and therefore for everyone.
A garden grown from Tuesdays is still a garden.
Be like the blob: mostly still, occasionally delighted.
The switch will always flip back. Fight it anyway. It's good for you both.
You returned. That was the hard part. This part is easy.
Some doors are just walls you decided to respect.
The proverb is not wise. The proverb is here, which is enough.
Every specimen was once an ordinary Tuesday you honoured.
Rest is also a shape the day can take.
Curiosity costs nothing and pays in odd little creatures.
The Curator has misplaced the manual and could not be happier.
A collection is just a diary that squishes when you poke it.
